help from home: ✅ Criteria & Requirements for a Gifted Deposit 1. It must be a true gift – Not a loan The money cannot be repaid. Lenders will ask for confirmation that the gift is not a loan and that the giver has no interest in the property. Your parents will usually need to sign a gifted deposit declaration letter. 2. Gifted Deposit Declaration Letter This letter should typically include: The name of the person gifting the money. Confirmation that the money is a gift and not a loan.

equity empowered: 🌟 Understanding Equity Release Mortgages: 🌟 What You Need to Know! Are you a homeowner aged 55 or older looking for a way to access the cash tied up in your property? An equity-release mortgage might be the solution for you! Pros: ✅ Access Cash: Use the money for retirement, home improvements, or to help family members. ✅ No Monthly Payments: You won’t have to make monthly repayments; the loan is paid back when you move into long-term care or pass away.

know before you borrow: As proof of identity, you will need your passport or a photo driving licence. Make sure your passport is valid and your driving licence shows your current address. You will also need two documents of proof of address: a bank statement, utility bill, council tax bill or credit card statement dated within the last three months. Please check whether you will be able to get your hands on these documents—this could be difficult if you have many direct debits and paperless bills.

mortgage maze: 🧭🏡 Feeling lost in the mortgage maze? Between rates, fees, criteria and jargon, it's easy to see why. That's exactly what we're here for, to guide you through every twist and turn until you come out the other side with the right deal for you.
move forward confidently: 🏡✅ Whatever stage of the property journey you're at, you deserve to move forward with confidence, not confusion. We'll make sure you understand every option available to you, so you can make decisions you feel good about.
protect whats inside: 🛡️👨‍👩‍👧 Your home is more than a building, it's everything and everyone inside it. Life and protection insurance help make sure that, whatever happens, your family's home life isn't turned upside down by financial worry too. Let's talk about the cover that's right for you.
rate reduction: 📉💰 Good news for borrowers! When rates move in the right direction, it's worth checking whether your current deal still stacks up. We'll compare the market and let you know if there's a better rate out there for you, it only takes a few minutes to find out.
re gift: 🎁 Still got a gift to exchange? While you're sorting that out, why not also take five minutes to check your mortgage deal is still the best one for you? It's the kind of "regifting" that could actually save you money this year.
saving: 💰🏡 Saving for a deposit can feel like the hardest part of buying a home, but every little bit adds up faster than you think. We can help you understand exactly how much you'll need and the schemes available to help you get there sooner.
savings: 💷✨ Whether you're saving for your first deposit or building a rainy-day fund, having a clear plan makes all the difference. Speak to us about how your savings goals fit into your wider mortgage and protection plans.
shopping: 🛍️🎄 Deep in the Christmas shopping? While you're ticking off the list, don't forget one thing that shouldn't wait until January, making sure your mortgage and protection are still working as hard for you as they should be.
smart moves: ♟️🏡 The smartest move in property isn't always the fastest one, it's the right one for your circumstances. We'll help you weigh up your options so your next move is a confident one.
spring: 🌷🏡 Spring is traditionally one of the busiest times in the property market. If you're thinking of buying, selling or remortgaging this season, now's a great time to get your mortgage options sorted so you're ready to move when the right property comes along.
too soon: 🎄 Is it too soon for Christmas talk? Never! But while you're getting into the festive spirit, it's also a good moment to make sure your finances are set up to enjoy the season stress-free. We're here if you need us, before, during or after the tinsel goes up.
